# Witch City Experiences

> Witch City Experiences is a Salem, Massachusetts company offering immersive ways to experience the history and craft of the Witch City. It is the parent company of two local brands.

## Brands
- [Witch City Walking Tours](https://witchcitywalkingtours.com/): Guided historic walking tours through the streets of Salem, Massachusetts.
- [Witch City Broom Co.](https://witchcitybroomco.com/): A full brick-and-mortar retail shop at 246 Essex St, Salem, MA 01970, offering hands-on broom-making workshops and take-home craft kits.

## Location
Salem, Massachusetts, United States. Witch City Broom Co. retail shop: 246 Essex St, Salem, MA 01970.

## Credit
